featureName: BUG-028-003: Reconcile artifact drift to current gate standards (G022/G053/Check-5A/Check-8A/Check-13B/Check-17)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-028-003 6-artifact-plus-manifest packet for 38 artifact-quality BLOCKS surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 22 (mode: stochastic-quality-sweep, trigger: harden, mapped child workflow mode: harden-to-doc, execution model: parent-expanded-child-mode) probe on spec 028. Findings categorized into 6 gate buckets: missing G022 specialist phase records (Check 6 x 4 + rollup), G022 Check 6B provenance impersonation (x 3 + rollup), missing G053 Code Diff Evidence section (Check 13B x 1), Check 5A SLA-substring false-positive on `slo` in `slog.Warn` needing Stress Test Plan row (x 1), missing Check 8A regression E2E DoD bullets + Test Plan rows on all 8 scopes (x 24 + rollup), and missing Check 17 structured commit prefix `^spec\(028\)|^bubbles\(028/` (x 1). Confirmed two prior BUG folders under spec 028 (BUG-028-001 G068 fidelity resolved 2026-04-27; BUG-028-002 compare-aggregator silent JSON swallow resolved 2026-05-12). No runtime path is changed; parent 028 stays done.

Applied all three scopes. Scope 1: appended 2 regression E2E DoD bullets + 1 Regression E2E Test Plan row to each of the 8 spec 028 scopes (24 markdown additions) + 1 Stress Test Plan row to Scope 5 (List Generator) pointing to TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates to clear the Check 5A SLA-substring false-positive on `slo` matching inside `slog.Warn`. Scope 2: added new '### Code Diff Evidence' section to specs/028-actionable-lists/report.md enumerating internal/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql (lines 545-588), internal/list/{types,store,recipe_aggregator,reading_aggregator,generator,harden_test}.go, internal/api/lists.go, internal/telegram/list.go, internal/intelligence/lists.go, cmd/core/main.go, config/smackerel.yaml, config/nats_contract.json, and tests/integration/artifact_crud_test.go. Scope 3: extended specs/028-actionable-lists/state.json::certification.certifiedCompletedPhases and execution.completedPhaseClaims with regression/simplify/stabilize/security; appended 7 retroactive bubbles.<phase>:<phase> entries to executionHistory[] (bootstrap, test, validate, regression, simplify, stabilize, security); appended BUG-028-003 to resolvedBugs; advanced lastUpdatedAt; and landed the reconciliation under a single commit prefixed `spec(028,bug-028-003):` to satisfy Check 17. No source-code behavior changed.

Re-ran all three framework guards. state-transition-guard.sh specs/028-actionable-lists goes from 38 BLOCKS to 0 BLOCKS (exit 0, TRANSITION ALLOWED). traceability-guard.sh specs/028-actionable-lists continues to PASS (no regression — BUG-028-001 closed the 10 G068 prefix gaps on 2026-04-27). artifact-lint.sh specs/028-actionable-lists continues to PASS. state-transition-guard.sh + artifact-lint.sh on the BUG-028-003 folder itself both exit 0. Integration tests not re-run because zero runtime code changed; tests/integration/artifact_crud_test.go::{TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus, TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates} and internal/list/*_test.go (including harden_test.go) remain GREEN by construction at HEAD 42863de8.

Parent spec 028 promoted from 38 BLOCKS to 0 BLOCKS. All three BUG-028-003 scopes promoted Not Started -> Done with checked DoD evidence. Parent 028 status stays done end-to-end; certification fields augmented with 4 new phases and 7 retroactive provenance entries grounded in real report.md probe sections.

Confirmed path-limited commit index contains only allowed paths (no specs/055-*, no specs/053-*, no specs/044-per-user-bearer-auth/state.json, no cmd/*, no internal/*, no ml/*, no docs/*, no web/*, no config/*, no scripts/*, no smackerel.sh, no docker-compose*.yml, no .github/bubbles/*). PII redaction verified: zero /home/<user>/ paths in evidence blocks; gitleaks linux-home-username-leak will not fire. Commit prefix 'spec(028,bug-028-003):' satisfies Check 17 structured commit gate.

Completion Statement added to report.md. Parent spec 028 state.json::resolvedBugs[] updated with BUG-028-003 close-out entry (resolvedAt, resolution paragraph). lastUpdatedAt advanced to 2026-05-23T00:00:00Z. Single path-limited commit stages only specs/028-actionable-lists/scopes.md, specs/028-actionable-lists/report.md, specs/028-actionable-lists/state.json, and the BUG-028-003 packet folder (8 files). Sweep ledger update committed separately by parent.

Confirmed zero runtime regression. BUG packet modifies only specs/028-actionable-lists/{scopes.md,report.md,state.json} and the BUG-028-003 packet folder; no edits to internal/, cmd/, ml/, web/, tests/, deploy/, config/, or scripts/. Persistent regression cover for list behavior: tests/integration/artifact_crud_test.go::{TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus, TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates} + internal/list/harden_test.go (BUG-028-002's 6 adversarial tests covering scanSources error propagation and all three aggregators' bad-JSON handling). Runtime path unchanged; protected scenarios remain green by construction.

No structural simplification opportunity. BUG packet is artifact-only and adds the minimum content required by gates G022/G053/Check-5A/Check-8A/Check-13B/Check-17: 16 DoD bullets + 8 Test Plan rows + 1 Stress row on parent 028 scopes (Scope 1), 1 Code Diff Evidence section on parent 028 report.md (Scope 2), 4 specialist phase records + 7 executionHistory entries + 1 resolvedBugs entry + 1 lastUpdatedAt advance + 1 structured commit prefix on parent 028 state.json + git log (Scope 3). All additions are mechanically demanded by gate checks; nothing speculative or duplicative was added.

Behavior stability confirmed. Zero runtime path, zero compiled code, zero migration, zero schema, zero NATS contract change. Parent spec 028 retained status=done end-to-end; list types, store, all three aggregators, generator, REST API, Telegram /list command, and intelligence relevance integration were all left untouched. No flake risk introduced; no test reordering or fixture mutation occurred. The 2026-05-12 BUG-028-002 silent-swallow remediation (compare aggregator no longer swallows json.Unmarshal errors) remains the most recent runtime stabilization on this spec.

Security posture preserved. Zero secret, credential, token, or auth path touched. gitleaks pre-commit hook will run on the staging set; all PII (linux-home-username-leak) was redacted to ~/ in every evidence block before staging. No new dependency, no new endpoint, no new permission boundary. The existing context-cancellation-aware queries in internal/list/store.go and the per-user list scoping at the API layer remain in force; this packet adds no new attack surface.
